label: dev-tier smoke (3 tasks)
notes: Dev-tier smoke run on 3 tasks. Agent model (qwen3-30b-a3b) correctly identifies user and order but fails product lookup and write actions. USER_STOP termination on 2/2 evaluated tasks. 1 infra error fixed by routing OPENAI_BASE_URL to OpenRouter for internal tau2 calls. Cost $0.00 because LiteLLM doesn't map new OpenRouter model aliases to pricing table — actual tokens consumed.
unexpected_behavior: Task 2 triggered repeated empty assistant messages from qwen3-30b-a3b before auth fallback. Fixed by setting OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 in eval/tau2/.env.
